title: Bump main to 5.0.0-dev
body:
Dev version bump, plus updated release notes from 4.7

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *ashley-cui*, *Luap99* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [Luap99,ashley-cui] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
just removing the lgtm until we for sure have the versioning figured out
I remember us dealing with many of these issues in the 4.0 bump, but aside from the version regex (already fixed) I cannot remember the fixes for the rest.

I think I can re-add the LGTM given that our API tests are succeeding.
/lgtm
im guessing we you fix this test that has failed as it will just pass onto the next commit and so -on?
I actually don't remember what optional release test does. I do know it only runs on release PRs, so we can merge without worrying about this breaking CI anywhere but release bumps.

IIRC The optional release test checks if the version has a -dev suffix or not. It should fail here, so it's not a problem. 

If someone can give this another slash lgtm, this should be ready to go in :)
